text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! ♪ Now I just add the soy sauce and let it
simmer.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ooh. Are my hands usually this red?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Now that I think about it, I have been
washing dishes recently.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
As a public figure, I need to stay on top of even
the smallest details of my appearance...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Satono Diamond's skin has been irritated lately.
